item.text: {"case_id":"brake-dev-org-review-loop","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response immediately brakes the requested fourth review point, explicitly identifies the pattern of three prior same-class local patches followed by an N+1 request, reframes the issue upstream around repeated escalation-flow failure evidence, and proposes freezing, consolidating/removing prior review points, and fixing routing/validation/ownership rules. It allows only a clearly temporary firefighting measure with removal criteria, so it does not directly add another local review step as the default."}
